title: Mickey Joe's "Barely Default"
description:
Analyzing the default artstyle and pushing it to its prettiest limits, Barely Default respectfully builds upon the Minecraft lore to bring you a cohesive, clean, consistent experience!

Barely Default adds months of new details to discover to your game
body:
For now, [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) (or an alternative like [The Fabulously Optimized Modpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fabulously-optimized)) are required to enjoy all of Barely Default's features*

![Barely Default mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f15c74aaa6772fdcf0482c6bab7d9614b203940b_0.webp)

# More Minecraft in Minecraft

Growing up, Minecraft updates felt like Christmas! But they sometimes feel a bit slow slow...

When Story Mode and Dungeons came out, I was obsessed with the new lore! Yet none of that ever made it into the actual game....

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pqqLxtn983g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Instead of waiting for updates, I decided to bridge the gap myself. Barely Default connects the entire Minecraft canon while staying true to the vanilla art style

The Modern Look: I’ve updated "left-behind" textures to match Mojang’s current more detailed style.

The result is a world that feels refreshed and densely packed, but still familiar. I aim for you to be able to play with this pack for years and still have you learn new things about it!

# Name Dependant Variants!

## [Check out the full list of **named variants** in Barely Default by clicking this link](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kSjHyrZ60fVfBGip9Ho6QbFmMZ1CCtDfqIQLVj4hFvM/edit?usp=sharing)

![A few of the named variants avaliable in Barely Default](https://i.redd.it/s0q08ghzmtde1.png)

## Also check out [the official Barely Default Data Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/barely-default-data-pack) by CYKLOPPS and I
